game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **黄金矿工 (Gold Miner)** Players control a stationary miner at the top of the screen, whose claw automatically swings left and right across a 2D mine shaft. A single tap anywhere on the screen deploys the claw downwards, which then retracts, pulling up the first item it hooks. Different items like small gold nuggets ($50), large gold nuggets ($500), rocks ($10), and diamonds ($600) have varying monetary values and weights, with heavier items significantly slowing the claw's retraction speed by up to 50%. Each level presents a specific money target, such as $500, which players must achieve within a strict time limit, typically 60 seconds, displayed on the UI. Successfully meeting the target advances the player to the next level, where money targets increase by approximately $100 and item layouts become more complex, while failure results in a game over. After each level, players can access a shop to spend earned money on single-use power-ups like dynamite to destroy unwanted grabbed items or strength potions to temporarily increase claw retraction speed by 50%.
game_info.description: Control a gold miner's mechanical claw to extract valuable items from underground mines! Your claw swings automatically left and right - press SPACE to deploy it downward to grab gold nuggets, diamonds, and rocks. Each item has different values: small gold ($50), large gold ($500), diamonds ($600), and rocks ($10). Heavier items slow down the claw's retraction speed. Meet the money target within the time limit to advance to the next level with higher goals and more complex layouts.
game_info.controls:
SPACE: Deploy claw downward to grab items
ENTER: Start the game
ESC: Pause/unpause the game
R: Restart to main menu (from game over screen)
Arrow Keys: Navigate shop menu (between levels)

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic claw deployment and item collection mechanics. Verify that the claw swings properly, deploys when triggered, grabs items, and retracts with appropriate speed based on item weight.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Automatically deploy the claw at regular intervals (every 120 frames) to grab various items. Test grabbing different item types and verify weight affects retraction speed correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The claw should successfully grab items, retract at speeds proportional to item weight, and update the money counter correctly. Heavy items should visibly slow the claw retraction.

TEST_2.test_description: Test winning condition by ensuring the player can complete a level by reaching the money target within the time limit. Verify level progression and target increases.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Focus on grabbing high-value items like diamonds and large gold nuggets efficiently. Deploy claw strategically when positioned over valuable items to quickly reach the money target.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test should successfully reach the money target before time expires, advance to the next level with increased target, and demonstrate proper level progression mechanics.
